title: NEXUS Agent Identity Manifest (AIM) v0.2
description: Canonical identity document for every NEXUS agent. Signed with ML-DSA-65 (FIPS 204) and published to ANS.

agentDID.description: W3C DID of the agent. Required. Must start with did:

spiffeID.description: SPIFFE workload identity URI. Required. Format: spiffe://{trust-domain}/agents/{class}/{tenant}/{agent-id}/{maturity}

agentClass.description: Deployment class determines profile tier and governance requirements

maturityLevel.description: ATF maturity level with behavioral track record. Maps to ACT tiers in AI SAFE2 v3.0 CP.3

ownerChain.description: DID of the human sponsor (owner_of_record). Required per AI SAFE2 v3.0 A2.4

purposeDeclaration.description: Specific operational purpose. Used as baseline for Memory Vaccine drift detection. Must be specific enough to enable embedding comparison.

jurisdictionProfile.description: Applicable jurisdiction tags. Examples: GDPR, FedRAMP_HIGH, FedRAMP_MOD, ITAR, CMMC_L3

mlKem1024.description: ML-KEM-1024 public key (FIPS 203). Required for NEXUS-Full

mlDsa65.description: ML-DSA-65 signing key (FIPS 204). Primary signing algorithm

pqcPublicKeys.description: Post-quantum cryptographic public keys. ml-DSA-65 required. ML-KEM-1024 required for NEXUS-Full profile.

capabilityDigest.description: SHA-256 hash of the CAD (Capability Assertion Document). Supply chain integrity check.

driftThreshold.description: Cosine distance threshold. Writes exceeding this trigger HARD_BRAKE.

a2asMigration.description: Backward compatibility bridge for A2AS-certified agents.

signature.description: Base64-encoded ML-DSA-65 signature over canonical JSON of all other fields.
